sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49411" key="qumopoie/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θῡμο-ποιέω</orth>, <sense id="n49411.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hearten, encourage</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὸ πλῆθος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Satyr.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Vit.Eur.Fr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">39iv31</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
